contentText:
Welcome to Lumenalta
Transforming businesses through intelligent technology solutions. We partner with enterprises to deliver cloud-native, AI-powered platforms that accelerate growth.
description: Opening title slide introducing Lumenalta brand and value proposition

contentText:
Our Approach
Discover. Design. Deliver. We follow a proven methodology that combines deep industry expertise with cutting-edge technology to solve complex business challenges.
description: Methodology overview showing three-phase delivery approach

contentText:
Industry Expertise
Healthcare, Financial Services, Energy, Retail -- our teams bring deep domain knowledge across verticals to ensure solutions align with regulatory and operational requirements.
description: Industry expertise overview across healthcare, finserv, energy, retail

contentText:
Cloud Migration Strategy
A comprehensive framework for enterprise cloud transformation covering assessment, planning, migration execution, and optimization phases.
description: Cloud migration strategy framework with four execution phases

contentText:
Total Cost of Ownership Analysis
Compare on-premise vs cloud costs across 3-year projections. Infrastructure savings of 35-45% combined with operational efficiency gains of 20-30%.
description: TCO comparison between on-premise and cloud infrastructure

contentText:
Security & Compliance Framework
SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, PCI-DSS compliant architecture patterns. Zero-trust networking with automated compliance monitoring and drift detection.
description: Security and compliance framework covering SOC2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS

contentText:
Data Pipeline Architecture
Real-time and batch processing pipelines using Apache Kafka, Spark, and cloud-native services. Event-driven architecture for sub-second data freshness.
description: Data pipeline architecture with Kafka, Spark, and cloud-native services

contentText:
Case Study: Meridian Health System
Reducing patient wait times by 40% through AI-powered scheduling and resource optimization. Implementation timeline: 14 weeks.
description: Healthcare case study showing 40% patient wait time reduction

contentText:
Case Study: Atlas Financial Group
Modernizing legacy trading platform to cloud-native microservices. 99.99% uptime, 3x throughput improvement, $2.1M annual infrastructure savings.
description: Financial services case study showing platform modernization results

contentText:
Platform Architecture
Microservices-based architecture with Kubernetes orchestration, service mesh, and API gateway. Supports multi-tenant deployments with isolated data planes.
description: Platform architecture with Kubernetes, service mesh, and API gateway

contentText:
CI/CD Pipeline Design
Automated build, test, and deployment pipelines with GitOps workflow. Feature flags, canary deployments, and automated rollback capabilities.
description: CI/CD pipeline design with GitOps, feature flags, and canary deployments

contentText:
Observability Stack
Distributed tracing, metrics aggregation, and log correlation. Real-time dashboards with intelligent alerting and automated incident response.
description: Observability stack with distributed tracing, metrics, and alerting

contentText:
API Gateway & Integration Layer
Unified API management with rate limiting, authentication, and versioning. Supports REST, GraphQL, and gRPC protocols.
description: API gateway design supporting REST, GraphQL, and gRPC

contentText:
Migration Roadmap
Phased approach: Phase 1 -- Core infrastructure (weeks 1-4). Phase 2 -- Application migration (weeks 5-10). Phase 3 -- Optimization and handover (weeks 11-14).

Next Steps
Schedule a deep-dive technical workshop. Our solutions architects will assess your current infrastructure and build a tailored migration plan within two weeks.
description: Closing slide with next steps and call to action

contentText:
Case Study: Verde Energy Smart Grid
Deploying IoT-enabled grid monitoring across 2,400 substations. Predictive maintenance reduced outages by 28% and maintenance costs by $3.2M annually.
description: Energy sector case study on smart grid IoT deployment

contentText:
Team & Governance Model
Dedicated pod structure: 1 Solutions Architect, 2 Senior Engineers, 1 DevOps Engineer, 1 QA Lead. Biweekly steering committee reviews with executive stakeholders.
description: Team structure and governance model for engagements
